# CIE Proceedings - Pass
# Conference proceedings papers (x-prefixed and standalone)

# x-prefixed (conference paper): CIE x<conf>-<CODE><num>
CIE x043-OP01
CIE x043-PO05
CIE x043-PP12
CIE x043-WP03
CIE x043-IP01
# single-letter paper code (x049 series)
CIE x049-P03

# standalone: CIE <CODE><num> <pageStart>-<pageEnd>
CIE OP02 1-5
CIE PO01 404-407
CIE PP06 265-270
CIE WP01 1-6
